title: potentilla subtrijuga
intro: Potentilla subtrijuga, also known as dwarf cinquefoil, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of tannins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Potentilla subtrijuga include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
